chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-187 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 573/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CM 574/25 4.For hearing of main case 28-07-2025 Mr. Sajid Ali Bhatti, Advocate along with both petitioners. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Petitioner No.1 Bindia is present and states that she being sui juris contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 without any pressure, compulsion and coercion, which has caused very much annoyed to her family members who are issuing threats for dire consequences. She further states that she has not been abducted or enticed away by anyone including the petitioner No.2; however, petitioners apprehend that petitioner No.2 and his family members will be booked in malicious false criminal cases at the hands of private respondents. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G present in Court in other matters while waiving notice submits that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the petitioners, as and when needed. After such statement, learned counsel for petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of a/w listed applications with directions to the SSP, Khairpur to provide protection to both the petitioners, as and when they needed and no FIR in respect of alleged abduction of petitioner No.1 be registered. JUDGE Ahmad
